title: eulophia × pholelana
intro: Eulophia × pholelana is a hybrid species of orchid, resulting from the cross between Eulophia speciosa and Eulophia pholelana, and is native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Eulophia × pholelana include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eulophia × pholelana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activities against various pathogens, making it a valuable natural remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Eulophia × pholelana is often used in the form of a paste or infusion, and is applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
